name: SONNIA CRIID
title: UNRELENTING

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Burning Brilliance
abilities.text: When this model succeeds in an action, it may remove a Shielded token to receive one additional raise.

abilities.name: Ignite
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage by an attack, it may drain a (soulstone) to give the attacker a Burning token and move it 4" directly away from this model.

actions.name: Witch Bane
actions.costs_and_restrictions: For each raise this action receives, this model may declare one additional different trigger, ignoring suits. This attack ignores (fortitude) abilities.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Sapping Flames
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove a friendly Burning token from the target. For each raise this action receives, draw a card.

actions.name: The Yellow Crypt
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove a friendly Burning token from the target. Enemy only: Summon a Witch Hunter model in base contact with either the target or this model.

actions.name: Through the Smoke
actions.effects: Move up to three unengaged allies within range up to 4". If this action received a raise, one moved model gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

extraction_notes: The Yellow Crypt has a special symbol (*) in the TN column which typically indicates variable TN or special conditions; represented as null in this extraction.
